zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude FitzHugh於1394年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir Henry FitzHugh37歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Grey31歲。她於1406年與Sir William Eure在英國越可爾斯托可斯利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年2月12日在英國越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude FitzHugh于1394年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Henry FitzHugh37岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Grey31岁。她于1406年与Sir William Eure在英国越可爾斯托可斯利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年2月12日在英国越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude FitzHugh was born in 1394, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Henry FitzHugh, was 37 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Grey, was 31. She married Sir William Eure in 1406, in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 12 February 1467, in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude FitzHugh est née en 1394, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry FitzHugh, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Grey, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Eure en 1406, à Stokesley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1467, à Old Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude FitzHugh 1394 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry FitzHugh 37 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Grey 31. Sie hat 1406 in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England Sir William Eure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1467 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude FitzHugh è nata il nel 1394 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry FitzHugh, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Grey, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Eure nel 1406, nel Stokesley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1467, nel Old Malton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Malton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude FitzHughが1394年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry FitzHughは37歳，母Lady Elizabeth Greyは31歳であった。1406年にイギリスヨークシュアイアストケスリーでSir William Eureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年2月12日にイギリスヨークシュアイアオルド マルトンで73歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアオルド マルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude FitzHugh(이)가 1394년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry FitzHugh(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Grey(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1406년 영국 요르크실르 스토케슬리에서 Sir William Eure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 2월 12일 영국 요르크실르 드 맬턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 드 맬턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude FitzHugh nasceu em 1394, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry FitzHugh, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Grey, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Eure em 1406, em Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1467, em Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude FitzHugh родилась в 1394 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry FitzHugh было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Grey, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Eure в 1406 г. в местности стокесли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 12 февраля 1467 г. в местности олд малтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности олд малтон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maude FitzHugh nació en 1394, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry FitzHugh, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Grey, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir William Eure en 1406, en Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1467, en Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
